steps.title: Set the expressions equal
steps.content:
Both equations equal $y$, so set the right sides equal.
$$-\frac{1}{9}x=\frac{1}{2}x$$

steps.title: Solve for the coordinate
steps.content:
Move the terms to one side and factor out $x$.
$$-\frac{1}{9}x-\frac{1}{2}x=0$$
$$-\frac{11}{18}x=0$$
$$x=0$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph both equations and read the $x$-coordinate of the intersection. The answer is C.
